prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Monte Carlo simulation (10000 runs) using Geometric Brownian Motion. Historical daily log returns over the past year for SBUX were used to estimate daily drift (0.0001) and daily volatility (0.0130). These parameters were then scaled for the 20-day prediction horizon to simulate future price paths. The point estimate is the median of the simulated prices, and confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles of the simulated price distribution.
